body_preview:
Hi Ry,

Just double-checking — is your mom still good for Friday? I went ahead and made a reservation at Alma Cocina for 7:30, figured we're overdue. They need a confirmation call by Thursday to hold the table, so let me know and I'll take care of it.

Al
subject: Hi Ry

body_preview:
Marcus,

Mom's confirmed — she texted me around noon, said she'll be there by six so we have a real buffer. Call Alma Cocina and tell them yes.

Denise and the aquarium is fine. Tell her earlier departure is better; Saturday mornings accelerate fast in th
subject: Re: Marcus

body_preview:
Denise,

Quick check-in — are we still doing Father's Day Sunday at your place? Marcus thought you might push it to the afternoon but hadn't heard back. Just trying to figure out timing and whether I need to account for Oscar driving in from Philly.

I'll
subject: Denise

body_preview:
Ryan,

Still on, yes. I'm thinking 2pm so I have the morning to do the potato salad without feeling rushed. Oscar called Tuesday — he's coming down Saturday, staying through Monday, so he'll be there.

Don't bother with dessert, sweet potato pies are alre
subject: Re: Ryan

body_preview:
Denise,

2pm works. Hazelnut creamer noted — and for the record I've stopped expecting it, I've just started bringing it.

Glad Oscar's making it. Andrew's been asking about him since Easter so that'll take the pressure off the rest of us to be interestin
subject: Re: Denise

body_preview:
Ryan,

Called Oscar last Tuesday and he's saying the 2nd through the 6th works for him, driving up from Richmond. He wants to know if you and Marcus have the pull-out cleared in the guest room or if he should look at booking something nearby — I told him
subject: Ryan

body_preview:
Mom,

Tell Oscar the pull-out's his. Guest room's clear those days.

Third works — aim for noon. Marcus is handling the grill, I'll do sides. Bring the cobbler, leave the potato salad unless you want to fight Marcus for the recipe credit, which honestly I
subject: Re: Mom

body_preview:
Ryan,

Ha. Tell Marcus I said his potato salad is fine. I'm still bringing mine.

Booked the 6:45 Amtrak out of Penn Station, arrives Baltimore just before 9. I know that's early — I'll sit in the kitchen with my coffee and not bother a soul until a decen
subject: Re: Ryan

body_preview:
Mom,

9am is fine. Coffee's always on.

Sunday church works — I'll check with Marcus on timing.

For August: Andrew is into building things right now, LEGO sets or anything mechanical. Fiona is reading everything she can get her hands on — chapter books,
subject: Re: Mom

body_preview:
Oscar,

Her birthday's the 27th and I'm already deep in scheduling hell trying to block that Saturday. Marcus is handling the cake order through that bakery in Catonsville he likes, but I need someone to nail down the fellowship hall at Shiloh before Sis
subject: Oscar

body_preview:
Ryan,

Already texted Pastor Reeves. Hall's open the 27th and he'll hold it through Friday without a deposit if I confirm by Thursday. Calling him tomorrow morning — I'll forward you the paperwork when it's done.

25–30 is fine. Tell Denise's people to RS
subject: Re: Ryan

body_preview:
Hey Dad,

Tried to lock down Sunday but Grandma Jacqueline wants to know whose house before she commits. I said ours but Marcus told me to check with you first. Uncle Oscar already assumed he's invited, which, same as every year.

Grandma Denise offered t
subject: Hey Dad

body_preview:
Drew,

Our place. 3pm. Tell Grandma Jacqueline that's firm before she negotiates it into 5:30 and acts like that was always the plan.

Uncle Oscar: tell him 2. He'll show at 2:50 and think he was early. The system works. Do not deviate from the system.

G
subject: Re: Drew

body_preview:
Dad,

Done. Grandma Jacqueline confirmed. Uncle Oscar was told 2 and said 'I'll be there at 2' so either the system finally broke him or he shows up at 1:40 and claims the couch.

North Charles confirmed the hazelnut pound cake is in. Not pivoting. Respec
subject: Re: Dad

body_preview:
Hi Fiona,

Thanks for the note. Tomorrow afternoon works — does 3pm fit?

Best,
Ryan
subject: Hi Fiona

body_preview:
3pm is great. Sending the calendar invite now.

Fiona
subject: Re: 3pm is great. Sending the calendar invite now

body_preview:
Got it, see you then.

Ryan
subject: Re: Got it, see you then

body_preview:
Quick reminder for our chat in 30 min.

Fiona
